rationale: Intake stage adds a new Feature folder, a canonical Engineering Spec, and a per-Feature index. Documentation-impact contract requires a recorded decision when a new artifact is introduced and references downstream librarian indexing.

deferred_items.rationale: Global memory/features/index.json is librarian-owned; intake stage stages the per-Feature artifacts and routes the global index update to the librarian post_run stage.
Layer 1 glossary discipline requires memory-tier vocabulary in memory/handbook/glossary.md; the implementation slice authors the glossary entry alongside memory/handbook/memory-tiers.md.
